name: ITS_primer_ITS4
description: Fungal ITS conserved anchor / primer 'ITS4' (length 20 bp). Consensus: TCCTCCGCTTATTGATATGC. Universal ITS reverse in 28S; White 1990. Conserved across Fungi at sub-1% mismatch; mapper should NOT tolerate high mismatch.
sources: White 1990 PCR Protocols (ITS1, ITS2, ITS3, ITS4)
